title: What Is Project Hawk Eye? AI-Powered Security System Set To Safeguard Amarnath Yatra 2026 In Anantnag District Of Jammu & Kashmir
description: Project Hawk Eye combines artificial intelligence, high-resolution cameras, drones, and modern monitoring systems to create a comprehensive security network across key stretches of the pilgrimage route. The system is capable of analysing live video feeds, detecting suspicious activities, tracking crowd movements, and alerting security personnel to unusual situations.
content: Amarnath Yatra is one of the sacred pilgrimage sites which is situated in the Anantnag district of Jammu & Kashmir. The annual yatra for 2026, which is set to begin from July 3 and it will conclude on August 28, 2026. To ensure the safety of pilgrims... [3302 chars]

title: Report: AI sales may justify buildout
description: Revenue from artificial intelligence has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View.

title: Oil costs’ fall buoys Wall Street dragged by AI losses
description: NEW YORK -- Most of the U.S. stock market rose Friday after oil prices eased back to where they were before the war with Iran, but drops for stocks swept up in the mania around artificial intelligence technology kept the market in check.
content:

title: Seth Freeman Is Backing These Sectors Auto, Healthcare Despite War And AI Uncertainty
description: Beyond geopolitics, he believes artificial intelligence remains another major theme shaping global capital flows. Massive investments are currently being made in AI infrastructure, data centres and semiconductor manufacturing, but Freeman cautioned that returns on those investments could take several years to materialise.

title: IIT Bombay announces first US sub-campus with SUNY Old Westbury
description: The proposed IIT Bombay presence at SUNY Old Westbury will focus on science, engineering and emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence.
content:
The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Bombay has signed a partnership with the State University of New York (SUNY) at Old Westbury to establish its first academic sub-campus in the United States.

title: IIT Bombay To Open Its First-Ever International Sub-Campus In US
description: The two institutions will work towards introducing new academic programmes across undergraduate, postgraduate, and research levels in science and engineering, with a focus on emerging fields such as artificial intelligence.

title: Artificial intelligence and being: An inquiry into Islamic intellectual tradition
description: AI, when viewed through Islamic cosmology, enacts a metaphysical inversion by subordinating the sacred hierarchy of being to computational logic, disrupting the divinely ordered creation (nizam) and balance (mizan)
